title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PLAZA LEON XIII (TRECE) IN FRONT OF TONDO CHURCH, MANILA, TO KA AMADO HERNANDEZ.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1465 / 67 OG No. 9, 1545 (March 1, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6164, November 09, 1970 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PLAZA LEON XIII (TRECE) IN FRONT OF TONDO CHURCH, MANILA, TO KA AMADO HERNANDEZ.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Plaza Leon XIII (Trece) situated in front of Tondo Church, Manila, is hereby changed to Ka Amado Hernandez.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, November 9, 1970.
